Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Phase 1 complete: authentication, user management, and role-based UI

- Custom branded login page \(mobile-first, Bootstrap 5, no default Django login\)
- Logout redirects to login page; forgot password stub page
- Role-based adaptive dashboard with welcome message, role badge, phase roadmap
- Role-aware sidebar navigation \(7 roles, desktop + mobile hamburger\)
- User management: list \(search/filter\), create, edit, deactivate/reactivate
- Delegated creation model: role dropdown limited to what creator can assign
- Admin password reset for Supplier Admin / Sales Manager and above
- My Profile: view, edit personal info, change own password
- Friendly 403 Access Denied page \(no raw error pages\)
- New User model fields: phone, created_by \(FK for management chain\)
- MESSAGE_TAGS configured for Bootstrap alert-danger compatibility
- Migration 0003: phone + created_by on User model
- manage.py check: 0 issues

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(python manage.py shell -c "
from django.db import connection

with connection.cursor\(\) as cursor:
    cursor.execute\(\\"\\"\\"
        SELECT tablename 
        FROM pg_tables 
        WHERE schemaname = 'public'
        ORDER BY tablename;
    \\"\\"\\"\)
    tables = cursor.fetchall\(\)

for table in tables:
    table_name = table[0]
    with connection.cursor\(\) as cursor:
        cursor.execute\(f'SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM \\"{table_name}\\"'\)
        count = cursor.fetchone\(\)[0]
    print\(f'{table_name}: {count} records'\)
")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Phase 10.2 - Event scheduling and status workflow

- Replace foundation Event model with full Phase 10.2 model:
  Tasting/Festival/Admin types; Draft/Scheduled/Recap Submitted/
  Revision Requested/Complete statuses; date, start_time,
  duration_hours/minutes, ambassador, event_manager, created_by,
  items M2M, notes, revision_note fields
- Add migration 0003 for all model changes
- Create apps/accounts/utils.py with reusable helpers:
  get_accounts_for_user\(\) and get_users_covering_account\(\)
  implementing coverage area union logic
- Event list at /events/: status-grouped sort order, mobile cards +
  desktop table, collapsible filter bar with session persistence,
  role-based visibility including ambassador draft exclusion
- Event detail at /events/<id>/: full info display, status action
  buttons \(Release, Approve & Complete, Request Revision modal\),
  revision note highlighted alert box
- Event create/edit at /events/create/ and /events/<id>/edit/:
  event-type-driven field visibility, AJAX ambassador and event
  manager dropdowns filtered by account coverage area
- Status transition endpoints: release, request-revision, approve
- AJAX endpoints: /events/ajax/ambassadors/ and /events/ajax/event_managers/
- Navigation: Events link added for all relevant roles in sidebar
  and mobile nav \(Supplier Admin, Sales Manager, Territory Manager,
  Ambassador Manager, Ambassador\)
- Update PRODUCT_DECISIONS.md: Phase 10.2 marked In Progress,
  revision_note field documented, Phase 10.2 features section added

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
User mgmt restriction, account edit rules, event form improvements, coverage area final rule

- Change 1: Restrict user management \(list/create/edit/deactivate\) to Supplier Admin
  and SaaS Admin only; remove Users nav link from all other roles
- Change 2: Hide Edit button for imported accounts \(auto_created=True\) in list and
  detail views; add server-side guard in account_edit; show explanatory info note
- Change 3: Replace account dropdown on event create/edit with live search interface;
  add GET /events/ajax/accounts/ endpoint filtered through get_accounts_for_user\(\)
- Change 4: Default start_time minutes to :00 on event create form
- Change 5: event_manager defaults to request.user for ALL roles on event create
- Change 6: Admin events hide start_time and event_manager fields; silently set
  event_manager=creator and clear start_time on save
- Change 7: Ambassador dropdown now includes Ambassador, AM, TM, Sales Manager
  \(coverage-area filtered\) plus Supplier Admin always included regardless of area
- Change 8: get_accounts_for_user\(\) final rule — SaaS Admin sees all companies,
  Supplier Admin sees all company accounts, all other roles \(incl Sales Manager\)
  use coverage area union logic
- Update PRODUCT_DECISIONS.md with all final rule sections

python manage.py check: 0 issues

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(PYTHONPATH="/home/runner/.local/lib/python3.13/site-packages" python -c "
import os
os.environ['DJANGO_SETTINGS_MODULE'] = 'producterp.settings'
import django
django.setup\(\)

from django.db.migrations.executor import MigrationExecutor
from django.db import connection
executor = MigrationExecutor\(connection\)
targets = executor.loader.graph.leaf_nodes\(\)
plan = executor.migration_plan\(targets\)
for migration, backwards in plan:
    print\(f'  {migration.app_label}.{migration.name}'\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(PYTHONPATH="/home/runner/.local/lib/python3.13/site-packages" python -c "
import os
os.environ['DJANGO_SETTINGS_MODULE'] = 'producterp.settings'
import django
django.setup\(\)

from django.db.migrations.loader import MigrationLoader
from django.db.migrations.graph import MigrationGraph
from django.db import connection
loader = MigrationLoader\(connection\)

targets = loader.graph.leaf_nodes\(\)
print\('Leaf nodes:', targets\)
plan = []
for target in targets:
    for node in loader.graph.forwards_plan\(target\):
        if node not in plan:
            plan.append\(node\)

for i, node in enumerate\(plan\):
    print\(f'{i+1:3d}. {node[0]}.{node[1]}'\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Phase 10.3.1 - Event Detail UI reorganization and admin event flow fix

Event Detail UI:
- New top bar: Back button + event type badge + status badge + Edit button
- Location card absorbs Schedule section \(date MM/DD/YY, start time hidden
  for Admin events, duration inline\)
- People section: Ambassador and Event Manager on same row \(col-6\), Created By below
- Items to be Sampled: visible in Draft and Scheduled only; hidden once recap
  workflow is active \(Recap Submitted, Revision Requested, Complete\)
- Revision note alert shown prominently when status = Revision Requested

Admin event flow fix:
- Release now sends Admin events Draft → Recap Submitted \(skips Scheduled\)
- Request Revision blocked for Admin events in both view and template

Test suite \(25 tests, all passing\):
- AdminEventReleaseTransitionTest: admin → RECAP_SUBMITTED, others → SCHEDULED
- EventReleaseValidationTest: date/ambassador/account required, non-draft blocked
- EventReleasePermissionTest: ambassador blocked, supplier admin allowed
- AdminEventApproveTest: RECAP_SUBMITTED → COMPLETE
- RequestRevisionAdminBlockTest: view + template guards
- ItemsSectionVisibilityTest: shown in draft/scheduled, hidden in recap+
- EventDetailLayoutTest: badges, date format, no start time for admin

Migration fixes \(squash migrations for test DB creation\):
- Add core/0002_squashed.py: eliminates distribution.account M2M reference
- Add events/0001_squashed.py: points directly to accounts.account
- Fix distribution/0004_remove_account.py: add missing dependency on
  imports/0003_remove_salesrecord to ensure correct migration ordering

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(PYTHONPATH="/tmp/pylibs" python manage.py shell -c "
import csv, io, tempfile, os
from apps.imports.views import _parse_csv_headers, _read_csv_rows

headers = ['Retail Accounts', 'Address', 'City', 'State', 'Zip Code', 'VIP Outlet ID', 'Counties', 'OnOff Premises', 'Dates', 'Item Names', 'Item Name ID', 'Quantity']
data = ['Test Store', '1 Main St', 'Hoboken', 'NJ', '07030', '12345', 'Hudson, NJ', 'OFF', '01/15/2024', 'Classic Red 750ml', 'Red0750', '10']

buf = io.StringIO\(\)
writer = csv.writer\(buf\)
writer.writerow\(headers\)
writer.writerow\(data\)

tmp = tempfile.NamedTemporaryFile\(mode='w', suffix='.csv', delete=False, encoding='utf-8-sig'\)
tmp.write\(buf.getvalue\(\)\)
tmp.flush\(\)
tmp.close\(\)

with open\(tmp.name, newline='', encoding='utf-8-sig'\) as f:
    reader = csv.reader\(f\)
    header_row = next\(reader\)

print\('Headers:', header_row\)
cols = _parse_csv_headers\(header_row\)
print\('Cols:', cols\)
rows, errors = _read_csv_rows\(tmp.name, cols\)
print\('Rows:', rows\)
print\('Errors:', errors\)
os.unlink\(tmp.name\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Phase 10.3.2 + UI tweaks: Event detail/list redesign, tasting validation, AccountItem models

Part 1 — UI tweaks:
- Event detail: rename Location→Event Details, move date/time/duration above
  account name \(values only, no labels\), show address+city inline after account
  name, remove state/zip, fold Ambassador and Event Manager into Event Details
  card, remove People card and Created By field
- Event list: add address+city below account name \(both mobile and desktop\),
  change date format to MM/DD/YY, apply light red background to Draft events
  on both card and table layouts
- Tasting release validation: block release with no items; show clear error message
- Updated existing tasting release test to add an item so it passes the new check

Part 2 — Phase 10.3.2 \(Account-Item Association\):
- Add AccountItem model \(account FK, item FK, date_first_associated, current_price,
  unique on account+item\)
- Add AccountItemPriceHistory model \(account_item FK, price, recorded_at, recorded_by\)
- Migrations for both new models and new ImportBatch.account_items_created stat field
- Update _execute_import\(\) to collect unique \(account, item\) pairs after bulk account
  creation and call get_or_create\(\) on AccountItem \(date_first_associated=today\);
  no price or price history set during import; count logged in batch stats
- Batch detail template shows Account-Item Links Created stat
- 55 tests all passing: 11 new AccountItem model tests, 13 new import integration
  tests, 7 new tasting release validation tests

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(cat >> /home/runner/workspace/apps/events/models.py << 'EOF'


class EventPhoto\(models.Model\):
    """
    Photo uploaded during event recap.

    Photos are associated to both the Event and the Account at upload time.
    file_url stores the path returned by the photo storage backend \(local
    media path in development, object storage URL in production\).
    """

    event = models.ForeignKey\(
        'events.Event',
        on_delete=models.CASCADE,
        related_name='photos',
    \)
    account = models.ForeignKey\(
        'accounts.Account',
        on_delete=models.SET_NULL,
        null=True,
        blank=True,
        related_name='event_photos',
    \)
    file_url = models.CharField\(max_length=500\)
    uploaded_at = models.DateTimeField\(auto_now_add=True\)
    uploaded_by = models.ForeignKey\(
        settings.AUTH_USER_MODEL,
        on_delete=models.SET_NULL,
        null=True,
        blank=True,
        related_name='uploaded_event_photos',
    \)

    class Meta:
        app_label = 'events'
        ordering = ['uploaded_at']

    def __str__\(self\):
        return f'Photo for {self.event} uploaded by {self.uploaded_by}'


class EventItemRecap\(models.Model\):
    """
    Per-item recap data captured during a Tasting event recap.

    One record per \(event, item\) pair. Created on first save; updated on
    subsequent saves. Shelf price is used to update AccountItem.current_price
    when the recap is submitted \(not on save\).
    """

    event = models.ForeignKey\(
        'events.Event',
        on_delete=models.CASCADE,
        related_name='item_recaps',
    \)
    item = models.ForeignKey\(
        'catalog.Item',
        on_delete=models.CASCADE,
        related_name='event_item_recaps',
    \)
    shelf_price = models.DecimalField\(
        max_digits=6,
        decimal_places=2,
        null=True,
        blank=True,
    \)
    bottles_sold = models.IntegerField\(null=True, blank=True\)
    bottles_used_for_samples = models.IntegerField\(null=True, blank=True\)

    class Meta:
        app_label = 'events'
        unique_together = [['event', 'item']]

    def __str__\(self\):
        return f'{self.item} recap for {self.event}'
EOF)
